message:
fix: query schema rejects LIMIT 0, strips distinct, requires value for IS NULL

Three bugs in query-schema.ts Zod validation:

1. limit used .positive() — LIMIT 0 (valid SQL, returns empty set) was
   rejected at the API boundary. Changed to .nonnegative().

2. distinct field missing from schema — API calls with distinct:["col"]
   had the field silently stripped by Zod, so DISTINCT never reached
   the query engine via HTTP.

3. filter value was required for all ops — is_null/is_not_null are unary
   (no value needed) but the schema demanded a dummy value. Made optional.
